message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor User
actor JobManager
rectangle "Process/Application" as Process
rectangle "ESDM" as ESDM
rectangle "Post Processing" as PostProcessing
rectangle "Storage System" as StorageSystem
actor Observer

activate Observer
Observer -> Observer : collects observations
StorageSystem <- Observer : (may write directly)
Observer -> ESDM : write observation t
ESDM -> ESDM : (transform for efficiency)
ESDM -> StorageSystem : write container for observation t

deactivate Observer

activate ESDM
JobManager -> JobManager : periodically submit job(IN=t, OUT)
JobManager -> Process : allocates resources and calls
Process -> ESDM : read IN=x
ESDM -> StorageSystem : read
StorageSystem -> ESDM : return
ESDM -> Process : return
Process -> Process : compute
Process -> ESDM : write async OUT=y

deactivate ESDM

activate ESDM
ESDM -> PostProcessing : make available
PostProcessing -> PostProcessing : perform analysis
PostProcessing -> StorageSystem : (may write directly)
PostProcessing -> ESDM : return result
ESDM -> Process : return

deactivate ESDM

Process -> Process : multiple iterations

activate ESDM
ESDM -> ESDM : Finalise
Process -> User : OUT files become visible

deactivate ESDM

@enduml
